safeDeal.heroTitle: Your money stays protected until your stock arrives
safeDeal.heroBody: On every AgroTraders trade, the buyer's payment is held safely in escrow and only released to the seller once the goods are delivered and confirmed. The same protection covers transporters, loaders and workers — so nobody pays for something that isn't delivered.
safeDeal.howSub: Four simple steps — the seller only gets paid at the very end.
safeDeal.step1Body: When you place an order the payment goes to AgroTraders's secure escrow account — not to the seller. The seller sees the funds are confirmed and starts preparing your goods.
safeDeal.step2Body: Your money is held safely on hold. The seller ships the goods; you track the shipment live from your dashboard. The seller cannot touch the funds yet.
safeDeal.step3Body: When the stock reaches you, inspect it against the agreed grade, quantity and quality. Raise a dispute within the inspection window if anything is wrong.
safeDeal.step4Body: Only once you confirm delivery is the money released from escrow to the seller. No confirmation, no payout — your funds stay protected the whole time.
safeDeal.holdTitle: Buyer's money is kept on hold — not sent to the seller
safeDeal.holdBody: The instant an order is placed, the amount is locked in escrow. It cannot be released, withdrawn or spent by anyone until you, the buyer, confirm the stock has reached you as agreed. If it doesn't arrive, you get every penny back.
safeDeal.coverSub: Escrow doesn't stop at the seller — it covers logistics and labour too.
safeDeal.coverSellersBody: Payment for goods is held until you confirm the stock arrived as described. Wrong grade or short quantity? The funds never leave escrow until it's resolved.
safeDeal.coverTransportersBody: Freight charges are released only after the trip is completed and delivery is verified with the pickup/drop OTP — so you pay for cargo that actually arrives.
safeDeal.coverLoadersBody: Loading fees stay on hold until the job is marked done with attendance proof. Crews get paid for work that's verified, not just booked.
safeDeal.coverWorkersBody: Individual workers' pay is escrowed against the job assignment and released on confirmed check-in and completion — no chasing payments after a shift.
safeDeal.g1: Funds ring-fenced in a segregated escrow account
safeDeal.g2: Full refund if the seller cancels or goods never arrive
safeDeal.g3: Neutral dispute resolution by the AgroTraders team
safeDeal.g4: Every release logged and auditable end-to-end
safeDeal.ctaBody: Join 42,800+ agribusinesses trading safely on AgroTraders. Every order, shipment and job is protected by SafeDeal escrow.

profile.privacyNote: Phone numbers and emails are private on AgroTraders — connect via chat, or trade with SafeDeal escrow.
